name: Cariboo Rose Resources Ltd.
summary: Cariboo Rose Resources Ltd., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Western Canada. The company explores for copper, gold, molybdenum, zinc, cobalt, and silver. It projects include the Lightning Strike, Pat, Cowtrail, Carruthers Pass, Coquigold, Koster Dam, and Carbonate Hosted Gold projects located in British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
